text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

Please stop spamming Bugzilla.

(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #3)

curl 7.87.0 was already in the tree on Dec 30 (ports c63a8f65afe14e82338fac73a1a5b21648d49388). I'm sure it'll be in the new quarterly branch.
